title: [Q] 复制excel文件内容到另一个Excel文件中时，若待复制的Excel中包含图片，复制后图片报错，不能显示
author: SweeperDuan
body: 如题，有没有大佬遇到的，怎么解决？

comments.author: Grety
comments.body: this is likely because images must be added in two steps. First to workbook, and then to the location as a reference. Just copying image references doesn't create images
